description: Curated learning resources for CSS architecture, methodologies, and organization

resources.title: BEM 101 (CSS-Tricks)
resources.description: An introduction to BEM naming convention with clear examples and common patterns

resources.title: ITCSS: Scalable and Maintainable CSS Architecture
resources.description: Comprehensive explanation of the Inverted Triangle CSS methodology by Harry Roberts

resources.title: OOCSS Introduction (Smashing Magazine)
resources.description: Nicole Sullivan's introduction to Object-Oriented CSS principles

resources.title: SMACSS: Scalable and Modular Architecture for CSS
resources.description: Jonathan Snook's book on CSS architecture with categorization system

resources.title: CSS @layer: A Comprehensive Guide
resources.description: In-depth guide to CSS Cascade Layers for controlling specificity and source order

resources.title: CSS Architecture: BEM, ITCSS & Modern Practices
resources.description: Kevin Powell explores CSS architecture methodologies with practical demos
resources.creator: Kevin Powell

resources.title: CSS Custom Properties Guide (CSS-Tricks)
resources.description: Complete guide to CSS custom properties for design tokens and theming

resources.title: MDN: CSS @layer
resources.description: Official MDN documentation for CSS Cascade Layers with syntax and examples

resources.title: Managing CSS Projects with ITCSS (Harry Roberts)
resources.description: Harry Roberts' talk on managing large-scale CSS projects with ITCSS
resources.creator: Harry Roberts

resources.title: Stylelint — CSS Linter
resources.description: Modern CSS linter that can enforce BEM naming, custom property usage, and architectural rules

resources.title: CSS Specificity Calculator
resources.description: Interactive CSS specificity calculator to understand selector weights

resources.title: Design Tokens Beyond Colors (UX Design Collective)
resources.description: How to build comprehensive design token systems that scale

resources.title: CSS Layers: The Ultimate Guide
resources.description: Deep dive into @layer with real-world refactoring examples by Una Kravets
resources.creator: Google Chrome Developers

resources.title: When to Use @layer (web.dev)
resources.description: Practical guidance on when and how to use CSS Cascade Layers

resources.title: The Specificity of :where(), :is(), and :has() (CSS-Tricks)
resources.description: Understanding modern CSS pseudo-classes and their specificity behavior

resources.title: Maintainable CSS: A Practical Guide (SitePoint)
resources.description: Practical strategies for writing CSS that teams can maintain over time
